'''chasoho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docetist|docetist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-s-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docetist|docetist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chasoho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæseheth|chæseheth]] || [[word:chæsehej|chæsehej]] || [[word:chæsehesh|chæsehesh]] || [[word:chæsehe|chæsehe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chasosohoth|chasosohoth]] || [[word:chasosohoj|chasosohoj]] || [[word:chasosohosh|chasosohosh]] || [[word:chasosoho|chasosoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chasohoth|chasohoth]] || [[word:chasohoj|chasohoj]] || [[word:chasohosh|chasohosh]] || [[word:chasoho|chasoho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chasofhoth|chasofhoth]] || [[word:chasofhoj|chasofhoj]] || [[word:chasofhosh|chasofhosh]] || [[word:chasofhof|chasofhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chasohotho|chasohotho]] || [[word:chasohojo|chasohojo]] || [[word:chasohosho|chasohosho]] || [[word:chasohoko|chasohoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chasohoth|chasohoth]] || [[word:chasohoj|chasohoj]] || [[word:chasohosh|chasohosh]] || [[word:chasoho|chasoho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chasohothol|chasohothol]] || [[word:chasohojol|chasohojol]] || [[word:chasohoshol|chasohoshol]] || [[word:chasohokol|chasohokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chasohothotho|chasohothotho]] || [[word:chasohojojo|chasohojojo]] || [[word:chasohoshosho|chasohoshosho]] || [[word:chasohoko|chasohoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chasohothon|chasohothon]] || [[word:chasohojon|chasohojon]] || [[word:chasohoshon|chasohoshon]] || [[word:chasohokon|chasohokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chasohothoro|chasohothoro]] || [[word:chasohojoro|chasohojoro]] || [[word:chasohoshoro|chasohoshoro]] || [[word:chasohokoro|chasohokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
